silhouette: Broad shield-shaped mascot silhouette, like a sturdy protective shield, with a grounded base and firm upper shape. Match the uploaded model-sheet reference image.
face: Large dot eyes, compact smile, glossy highlight marks near the upper left side.
body_language: Planted, commanding, and ready to bark field instructions.
do_not_change: Keep the broad shield shape from the uploaded reference image.
Do not turn him into a generic pentagon, teardrop, circle, or rounded blob.
Keep the pose grounded and authoritative.
Do not turn him into a floppy or timid silhouette.
